text:
Once upon a time, in a lush green meadow surrounded by tall, whispering trees, there lived a tiny kitten named Luna. Luna was a curious feline with eyes as bright and shiny as starlight and fur that shimmered like the morning dew.

One sunny afternoon, while exploring the meadow, Luna stumbled upon an old, gnarled oak tree. Curious, she scampered up the trunk and found a cozy hollow nest filled with soft, fluffy leaves. In the middle of the nest lay a small, injured bird. Luna's heart melted at the sight of the little creature, and without hesitation, she curled up beside it, using her body to shield it from the harsh sunlight.

Over the next few days, Luna brought bits of grass and insects to the bird, watching over it as it slowly recovered. The bird became stronger each day, and soon enough, it was ready to fly away. On the last day, the bird chirped softly and hopped onto Luna
